data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Transfer/revoke controls', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that demonstrates the implementation or testing of this functionality. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in requirement coverage for this specific functionality.
gaps: No evidence of transfer/revoke controls functionality being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for transfer/revoke controls
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the transfer/revoke controls functionality.
